transforms.code:
uniqueOptions=[]
	for row in range(value.getRowCount()):
		val=value.getValueAt(row, 0)
		uniqueOptions.append(val)
	return uniqueOptions

config.script:
target=self.view.params.table
	path="Insert/{}_types".format(target)
	parameters=system.util.jsonDecode(system.util.jsonEncode(self.props.data))
	if 'description' not in parameters.keys():
		parameters['description']=""
	parameters['is_active']=True
	project=system.util.getProjectName()
	targetType=system.db.execQuery(path=path, parameters=parameters, project=project)
	self.view.refreshBinding("custom.queryItems")
	system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshFormBindings")
	self.reset()
